_source: IGN Wiki, TechWiser, BloxInformer, Sportskeeda (search snippet), Eurogamer

tier_list_consensus.note: Tier rankings vary slightly between sources. TechWiser is more recent (June 23, 2026). IGN also provides detailed class info (June 23, 2026).

classes.name: Surgeon
classes.ability: Gain Sanity and a short speed boost after healing a patient

level_upgrades.level_1: Get Sanity and Short Speed Boost after healing a Patient
level_upgrades.level_2: Get Sanity and a longer (8s) speed boost after healing a Patient
level_upgrades.level_3: Get x2 Sanity and a longer (8s) speed boost after healing a patient, +10 bonus Sanity

classes.description: The top class in Animal Hospital for non-Robux players. Passive Sanity gain and speed boost on every heal makes you self-sustaining as you treat more patients.

classes.name: Secret Agent
classes.ability: Start with a gun (dangerous, multiple uses)

level_upgrades.level_2: Start with a gun (dangerous, 30 uses), +10 bonus Sanity
level_upgrades.level_3: Start with a gun (dangerous, 30 uses) that regenerates 1 use each round, +20 bonus Sanity

classes.description: The overall best class if willing to spend Robux. The Gun allows you to deal with any powerful Anomalies. At level 3, the gun regenerates between rounds.
classes.price_note: BloxInformer lists 790 Robux; IGN lists 890 Robux; TechWiser lists 320 Robux. Actual price may vary by update.

classes.name: Doctor

level_upgrades.level_1: Recover 1 Sanity when healing Patients, +10 bonus Sanity
level_upgrades.level_2: Recover Sanity when healing Patients, +15 bonus Sanity
level_upgrades.level_3: Recover Sanity when healing Patients, +20 bonus Sanity

classes.description: The best free option before saving enough for Surgeon. Recovering Sanity on every heal keeps you in a healthy state throughout the shift.

classes.name: Psychologist
classes.ability: All Sanity effects are doubled (positive AND negative)

level_upgrades.level_1: All Sanity effects are doubled (positive and negative)
level_upgrades.level_2: All Sanity effects are doubled (positive and negative), with a 7.5% chance to ignore Sanity loss
level_upgrades.level_3: All Sanity effects are doubled (positive and negative), with a 15% chance to ignore Sanity loss

classes.description: A high risk, high reward pick. Doubled Sanity effects mean you recover faster from positive sources but also take more damage from negative ones. Level 2+ adds a chance to ignore Sanity loss entirely.

classes.name: Security

level_upgrades.level_2: Start with X-Taser (8 Uses), +10 bonus Sanity
level_upgrades.level_3: Start with X-Taser (8 Uses), +15 bonus Sanity

classes.description: Starts you with a Taser for dealing with Anomalies. However, the Taser is available for free in the Reception Office, making the high Animal Coin cost hard to justify.

classes.name: Secretary
classes.ability: Recover 1 Sanity when checking in patients

level_upgrades.level_1: Recover 1 Sanity when checking in patients
level_upgrades.level_2: Recover Sanity when checking in Patients, +5 bonus Sanity
level_upgrades.level_3: Recover Sanity when checking in Patients, +10 Bonus Sanity

classes.description: Useful early in a shift when patients flow in steadily. Value drops once the lobby quiets down. Best of the B-tier classes according to IGN.

classes.name: Head Nurse

level_upgrades.level_2: +3 to your Max Inventory Capacity, and +10 Bonus Sanity
level_upgrades.level_3: +3 Max Inventory Capacity, start each round with all items

classes.description: Increased inventory space lets you carry more items around the hospital. Well-rounded stats. IGN ranks this S-tier; TechWiser ranks B-tier due to Robux cost.
classes.price_note: BloxInformer lists 140 Robux; TechWiser lists 80 Robux; IGN lists 190 Robux. Actual price may vary by update.

classes.name: Paramedic
classes.ability: Start with Large Speed Cola (6 uses)

level_upgrades.level_1: Start with Large Speed Cola (6 Uses)
level_upgrades.level_2: Start with Large Speed Cola (9 Uses)
level_upgrades.level_3: Start with Large Speed Cola (9 Uses), and one use regenerates each round

classes.description: Movement speed boosts help bounce between patients, but speed alone doesn't stop patients from dying or Sanity from draining. Better at level 3 with regenerating uses.

classes.name: Nurse
classes.description: A single inventory slot for 10 coins is essentially nothing. No Sanity passives mean you'll eventually be overwhelmed. Better to upgrade quickly.

classes.name: Intern
classes.description: The default starting class everyone begins with. Only provides a moderate Sanity boost. Mostly a stepping stone to unlock better classes.

destructoid.status: Could not scrape (403 blocked). Available in search snippet: S-Tier best classes, A-Tier second-best, B-Tier, C-Tier mentioned.

progameguides.status: Could not scrape (403 blocked). Search snippet: Surgeon S-Tier (sanity + speed), Head Nurse S-Tier (inventory).

S.name: Gun (20 shots)
S.description: Ranged weapon with 20 shots, stronger than Taser

S.name: Chocolate
S.description: Restores 20 Sanity per bite, 3 bites total (60% max)

B.name: Coffee
B.description: Restores 5 Sanity per sip, 3 sips (15% max)

B.name: Revive 1 Dead Player
B.description: Brings back a teammate who hit 0 Sanity

C.name: Give Medicine From Inventory
C.description: Apply medicine without being at the shelf

D.name: Fire Extinguisher
D.description: Free in shop, used for fire events
